title: [InstCombine] Fold icmp over select of cmp more aggressively

tests.outside_scope_reason: Summary focuses on ucmp/scmp folding to icmp but doesn't explicitly cover signed predicate (sgt) combinations with scmp intrinsic where one side is constant non-zero value

alive2.tgt:
; ModuleID = '<stdin>'
source_filename = "<stdin>"

define i1 @sel_icmp_scmp_signed_predicate(i1 %c, i32 %a1, i32 %a2) {
  %cmp1 = icmp sgt i32 %a1, %a2
  %not.c = xor i1 %c, true
  %cmp = select i1 %not.c, i1 true, i1 %cmp1
  ret i1 %cmp
}

; Function Attrs: nocallback nosync nounwind speculatable willreturn memory(none)
declare i8 @llvm.scmp.i8.i32(i32, i32) #0

attributes #0 = { nocallback nosync nounwind speculatable willreturn memory(none) }
alive2.log:
----------------------------------------
define i1 @sel_icmp_scmp_signed_predicate(i1 %c, i32 %a1, i32 %a2) {
#0:
  %v = scmp i8 i32 %a1, %a2
  %#range_0_%v = !range i8 %v, i8 255, i8 2
  %sel = select i1 %c, i8 %#range_0_%v, i8 5
  %cmp = icmp sgt i8 %sel, 0
  ret i1 %cmp
}
=>
define i1 @sel_icmp_scmp_signed_predicate(i1 %c, i32 %a1, i32 %a2) {
#0:
  %cmp1 = icmp sgt i32 %a1, %a2
  %not.c = xor i1 %c, 1
  %cmp = select i1 %not.c, i1 1, i1 %cmp1
  ret i1 %cmp
}
Transformation seems to be correct!

Summary:
  1 correct transformations
  0 incorrect transformations
  0 failed-to-prove transformations
  0 Alive2 errors

tests.outside_scope_reason: Summary mentions 'either operand simplifies' but existing tests show both cmp intrinsics or both constants; this tests mixed case with one cmp intrinsic and one variable that still folds due to eq predicate with 0

alive2.tgt:
; ModuleID = '<stdin>'
source_filename = "<stdin>"

define i1 @sel_icmp_mixed_constant_and_intrinsic(i1 %c, i32 %a1, i32 %a2, i8 %b) {
  %cmp1 = icmp eq i32 %a1, %a2
  %cmp2 = icmp eq i8 %b, 0
  %cmp = select i1 %c, i1 %cmp1, i1 %cmp2
  ret i1 %cmp
}

; Function Attrs: nocallback nosync nounwind speculatable willreturn memory(none)
declare i8 @llvm.ucmp.i8.i32(i32, i32) #0

attributes #0 = { nocallback nosync nounwind speculatable willreturn memory(none) }

  %#range_0_%v = !range i8 %v, i8 255, i8 2
  %sel = select i1 %c, i8 %#range_0_%v, i8 %b
  %cmp = icmp eq i8 %sel, 0
  ret i1 %cmp
}

#0:

  %cmp2 = icmp eq i8 %b, 0
  %cmp = select i1 %c, i1 %cmp1, i1 %cmp2

tests.outside_scope_reason: Summary specifically mentions 'sle' predicate in examples but doesn't cover 'ne' predicate which also simplifies cmp intrinsics when comparing against zero

alive2.log:
----------------------------------------
define i1 @sel_icmp_ne_predicate_zero(i1 %c, i32 %a1, i32 %a2) {
#0:
  %v = scmp i8 i32 %a1, %a2
  %#range_0_%v = !range i8 %v, i8 255, i8 2
  %sel = select i1 %c, i8 %#range_0_%v, i8 0
  %cmp = icmp ne i8 %sel, 0
  ret i1 %cmp
}
=>
define i1 @sel_icmp_ne_predicate_zero(i1 %c, i32 %a1, i32 %a2) {
#0:
  %cmp1 = icmp ne i32 %a1, %a2
  %cmp = select i1 %c, i1 %cmp1, i1 0
  ret i1 %cmp
}
Transformation seems to be correct!

Summary:
  1 correct transformations
  0 incorrect transformations
  0 failed-to-prove transformations
  0 Alive2 errors
